title: R404 open after truck loses its cargo
description: GEORGE NEWS & VIDEOS - Both lanes of the...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEOS - Both lanes of the R404 between Blanco and the Outeniqua Pass have been reopened after a truck lost some of its hay cargo.


> The hay bales are still being cleared from the road and drivers are urged to remain vigilant.


It appears that the truck lost control while coming around a sharp turn and hit the barricade, causing it to lose its cargo.

VIDEO: Jacques du Toit

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
